name: mdg-cli
description: Node-centric context retrieval CLI for LLM harnesses. Token-budgeted search with effort presets, mind palace (stash/drop/compose/relationships), pagination, MCP server, multi-tool schemas for Claude & Gemini.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='dist/index.js'; const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); if(!c.startsWith('#!')) fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);"
scripts.bench: npm run bench:micro && npm run bench:meso && npm run bench:meso-embed && npm run bench:conv && npm run bench:agg
